description: A card on a medium-blue background with a faint topographic-line texture. A centered square photograph shows a bearded man in a dark beanie or cap and a tan jacket with a U.S. flag patch and an ID or ribbon patch on the chest, sitting in the caged back seat of a law-enforcement vehicle; a metal prisoner-partition screen is visible behind him. He looks toward the camera. Across the bottom of the photo is a red banner with large white all-caps text 'DETAINED.' Below the photo, large white serif type gives the name 'Javier Ulises Sanchez-Andazola', followed by smaller white text 'CONVICTED OF SEXUAL ASSAULT AGAINST A CHILD AND DUI IN GREELEY.' (with the offense phrases bolded). Beneath that, spaced-out faint capitals read 'DENVER', and at the bottom is the DHS seal next to the white wordmark 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.'
notable_text: DETAINED; Javier Ulises Sanchez-Andazola; CONVICTED OF SEXUAL ASSAULT AGAINST A CHILD AND DUI IN GREELEY; DENVER
